title: fm~

messages.description: modulation frequency as ratio of carrier

arguments.description: modulation frequency as ratio of carrier

body: [fm~] is a simple frequency modulation unit consisting of a pair of sinusoidal oscillators, where one modulates the frequency input of another. The modulation frequency is set as a ratio of the carrier and the modulation index is multiplied by this resulting frequency. The object has support for multichannels.
